name: Quick & Easy Frog's Eye Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup (8 oz.) RONZONI Acini Pepe, uncooked, drained
2 cans (11-oz. ea) Mandarin orange segments, in juice, undrained
1 can (20-oz.) Pineapple chunks, in juice, undrained
1 package (4-serving size) Vanilla instant pudding & pie filling mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. Rinse with cold water to cool quickly; drain well.
3. Drain juice from pineapple chunks, reserving 1/4 cup.
4. In a large bowl, add reserved juice, milk, sugar and pudding mix; beat with whisk or electric mixer until well blended, about 1 to 2 minutes. Add pasta to pudding mixture; stir gently.
5. Let stand 10 minutes.
6. Add crushed pineapple and chunks, oranges, 2 cups whipped topping, marshmallows and coconut; mix gently and thoroughly.
7. Cover; refrigerate until cold.
8. Top with remaining whipped topping. Garnish with cherries. Serve 12 servings (about 1 cup each).
